race.comment: Onto Day 3 of The Bool - home stretch punters! Quite a few of these have scratched after running Tuesday. The one on fresh legs is GOLDEN CRUSADER (1) who looks the one to beat in the Champion Novice Hurdle to kick off the day. He was far too good winning a BM115 Hurdle at Terang last time when heavily supported to score by 4 lengths. Now unbeaten in 2 hurdle runs and looks one that can make the top grade next season. ONGATITI (7) does back up from winning his maiden hurdle on Tuesday and he did it dominantly there, scoring by 10 lengths. The form out of his placing at Terang prior reads well. Clear danger. FENGARADA (8) got up the inside to score narrowly on Tuesday in a good effort. He absolutely loves it wet and will be ploughing through the conditions. MR WATERVILLE (11) tried hard on Tuesday when just missing and can only improve off that debut.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 [Provincial] Warrnambool May Racing Carnival - Prize Money: $50,000
